name: Ben Vereen
abstract: Benjamin Augustus Vereen (né Middleton; October 10, 1946) is an American actor, dancer, and singer. He gained prominence for his performances in the original Broadway productions of the musicals Jesus Christ Superstar, for which he received a Tony Award nomination, and Pippin, for which he won the 1973 Tony Award for Best Actor in a Musi…

about_quotes.speaker: Doc Cheatham
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...did you see the television show with Ben Vereen playing Louis Armstrong? [INTERVIEWEE] I didn't see that. But I heard so much about it.
